rulings.Case Title: DONALD LEVINE VS BLOSSOM LUN JANG
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Summary Adjudication And Demurrer
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER - OVERRULED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 1 & 6. SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 2 & 3. DEFENDANT NOT STRANGER TO THE CONTRACT. SEE APPLIED EQUIPMENT CORP. V. LITTON SAUDI ARABIA, LTD., (1994) 7 CAL.4TH 503, 514. SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 4 & 5. SEE ARNTZ V. ST. PAUL FIRE & MARINE INS., (1996) 47 CAL.APP.4TH 464, 478-480. SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 7. SEE HOOD V. SUP. CRT., (1995) 33 CAL.APP.4TH 319, 324. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION - OFF CALENDAR AS MOOT. (PB)
